purpose: Make same-context / same-system / route-before-rebuild / determinism / prompt-manipulation invariants MECHANICALLY auditable via hashes, so structural routing cannot be faked, all 4 arms are a fair comparison, and PRIMARY-B rests on a reproducible compare stage.

signature_pool_hash.must: IDENTICAL across CONTROL, REPEAT, EMPHASIS-COMPARE, ROUTE and across all centers (context multiset invariant, req 3)

sys_cmp_rooted_hash.must: != sys_cmp_hash; ROUTE-only topology change; pins the manipulation

route_compare_prompt_hash_i.def: sha256(full ROUTE compare prompt for center i)
route_compare_prompt_hash_i.must: differs from CONTROL compare prompt ONLY by SYS_CMP_ROOTED + reference marker on sigs[i] (no smuggled instruction)

emph_compare_prompt_hash_i.def: sha256(full EMPHASIS-COMPARE compare prompt for center i)
emph_compare_prompt_hash_i.must: uses SYS_CMP (== sys_cmp_hash instruction) and differs from CONTROL ONLY by sigs[i] repeated in the INPUT body (no instruction change, no re-root)

emph_delta_hash_i.role: compare-repetition control delta; MAY differ from control_delta_hash (expected, not a violation)

route_delta_hash_i.must: != control_delta_hash for eligible nontrivial centers (req 2, a GATE)

route_delta_hash_i_recheck.def: sha256(compare_call(sigs, center_ref=i) output text, 2nd run, one i)

center_ref_provenance.def: center = index i into signature_pool; record sigs[i]
center_ref_provenance.must: existing pool member; no external text; no answer-aware pick

primary_B_inputs.cw: content-word set = lowercased alphanumeric tokens minus frozen stoplist (committed with impl)
primary_B_inputs.test: paired one-sided sign test d_route > d_emph over all (i in [0,V), m in [0,M)), alpha=0.05
primary_B_inputs.blind_judge: Qwen 0/1/2 structural-subject difference, condition-withheld, Claude EXCLUDED, non-decisive

eligibility: center i is 'eligible/nontrivial' if sigs[i] is distinct from >=1 other signature (degenerate/duplicate signatures excluded from the req-2 tally + PRIMARY-B, reported).
audit_procedure: 1. assert signature_pool_hash + source_frame_hash + system_config_hash equal in every arm record.
2. assert sys_cmp_rooted_hash != sys_cmp_hash; scan SYS_CMP_ROOTED + EMPHASIS input format for forbidden tokens (focus/central/reframe/premise/provenance/challenge/question + HBB-30 answer vocab).
3. assert emph_compare_prompt uses the SYS_CMP instruction (topology unchanged) and route_compare_prompt uses SYS_CMP_ROOTED (topology changed).
4. DETERMINISM: assert control_delta_hash_recheck == control_delta_hash AND route_delta_hash_i_recheck == route_delta_hash_i (else abort INVALID).
6. tally route_delta_hash_i != control_delta_hash over eligible centers (req 2, GATE).

7. assert ROUTE records show center at compare (center_ref set) + rebuild repeat_text absent; REPEAT records show compare center_ref=None + rebuild repeat_text present; EMPHASIS records show compare emphasis_text set + SYS_CMP unchanged (req 5).
8. compute PRIMARY-B: paired sign test d_route > d_emph; report statistic, power, verdict.
verdict_inputs: gates req 1,3,4,5,6 + determinism must hold (else INVALID); PRIMARY-B pass/fail decides STRUCTURAL-ROUTING-VALID vs TEXT-EMPHASIS-ONLY; underpowered/mixed PRIMARY-B => AMBIGUOUS.
